1: -module(iguana_meta_guard_SUITE).
    2: -include_lib("common_test/include/ct.hrl").
    3: -include("iguana.hrl").
    4: 
    5: -export([all/0, init_per_suite/1, end_per_suite/1]).
    6: -export([test_initial_state/1, test_domain_shift/1, test_unknown_domain/1, test_swarm_broadcast/1]).
    7: 
    8: all() ->
    9:     [test_initial_state, test_domain_shift, test_unknown_domain, test_swarm_broadcast].
   10: 
   11: init_per_suite(Config) ->
   12:     %% Start pg (process groups) needed for the swarm
   13:     application:start(pg),
   14:     {ok, _} = iguana_meta_guard:start_link(),
   15:     Config.
   16: 
   17: end_per_suite(_Config) ->
   18:     ok.
   19: 
   20: test_initial_state(_Config) ->
   21:     default = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain().
   22: 
   23: test_domain_shift(_Config) ->
   24:     %% We need at least one guard in the swarm to avoid errors during broadcast
   25:     {ok, GuardPid} = iguana_entropy_guard:start_link(),
   26:     
   27:     iguana_meta_guard:set_domain(medical),
   28:     %% Cast is asynchronous, wait a bit for processing
   29:     timer:sleep(100),
   30:     medical = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain(),
   31:     
   32:     %% Verify the guard received the threshold (medical => 1.8)
   33:     {ok, State} = iguana_entropy_guard:get_stats(GuardPid),
   34:     1.8 = State#state.entropy_threshold,
   35:     
   36:     gen_server:stop(GuardPid).
   37: 
   38: test_unknown_domain(_Config) ->
   39:     OldDomain = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain(),
   40:     iguana_meta_guard:set_domain(non_existent_domain),
   41:     timer:sleep(100),
   42:     %% Should keep the old domain
   43:     OldDomain = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain().
   44: 
   45: test_swarm_broadcast(_Config) ->
   46:     %% Test broadcasting to multiple guards
   47:     {ok, G1} = iguana_entropy_guard:start_link(),
   48:     {ok, G2} = iguana_entropy_guard:start_link(),
   49:     
   50:     iguana_meta_guard:set_domain(finance),
   51:     timer:sleep(100),
   52:     
   53:     {ok, S1} = iguana_entropy_guard:get_stats(G1),
   54:     {ok, S2} = iguana_entropy_guard:get_stats(G2),
   55:     
   56:     %% finance => 2.0
   57:     2.0 = S1#state.entropy_threshold,
   58:     2.0 = S2#state.entropy_threshold,
   59:     
   60:     gen_server:stop(G1),
   61:     gen_server:stop(G2).
